import { createPirClient, hexToBytes, bytesToHex, cuckooHash1, cuckooHash2, CUCKOO_NUM_BUCKETS, scriptHash } from './src/index.js'; let client = null; let paginationState = null; let currentPage = 0; const PAGE_SIZE = 20; let lastConnectedUrls = { server1: '', server2: '' }; function log(message, type = 'info') { const logDiv = document.getElementById('log'); const entry = document.createElement('div'); entry.className = `log-entry ${type}`; entry.textContent = `[${new Date().toLocaleTimeString()}] ${message}`; logDiv.appendChild(entry); logDiv.scrollTop = logDiv.scrollHeight; } function setStatus(message, isConnected) { const statusDiv = document.getElementById('status'); statusDiv.textContent = `Status: ${message}`; statusDiv.className = `status ${isConnected ? 'connected' : 'disconnected'}`; } function setButtons(connected) { document.getElementById('connectBtn').disabled = connected; document.getElementById('disconnectBtn').disabled = !connected; updateReconnectButton(); } function updateReconnectButton() { const server1 = document.getElementById('server1Url').value.trim(); const server2 = document.getElementById('server2Url').value.trim(); const reconnectBtn = document.getElementById('reconnectBtn'); // Show reconnect button if URLs have changed since last connection if (client && (server1 !== lastConnectedUrls.server1 || server2 !== lastConnectedUrls.server2)) { reconnectBtn.classList.remove('hidden'); } else { reconnectBtn.classList.add('hidden'); } } function setResult(message) { document.getElementById('result').textContent = message; } function formatSatoshisToBtc(satoshis) { const btc = Number(satoshis) / 100_000_000; return btc.toFixed(8); } function updateUtxoTable(entries, startIndex) { const tbody = document.getElementById('utxoTableBody'); tbody.innerHTML = ''; entries.forEach((entry, i) => { const row = document.createElement('tr'); const rowIndex = startIndex + i + 1; const txid4b = entry.txid; // Check if we have a cached result for this TXID const cachedResult = txid32bCache.get(txid4b); let cachedHtml = ''; if (cachedResult) { // Make it a clickable link to mempool.space cachedHtml = `${cachedResult}`; } else if (cachedResult === null) { cachedHtml = `
Not found
`; } const buttonDisabled = cachedResult !== undefined ? 'disabled' : ''; row.innerHTML = ` ${rowIndex}
${txid4b}
${cachedHtml}
${entry.vout} ${entry.amount.toString()} ${formatSatoshisToBtc(entry.amount)} BTC `; tbody.appendChild(row); }); // Add click handlers for all lookup buttons that aren't disabled document.querySelectorAll('.txid-lookup-btn:not([disabled])').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', async (e) => { const txid4b = parseInt(e.target.dataset.txid); const rowNum = e.target.dataset.row; await lookupTxid32b(txid4b, rowNum); }); }); } // Cache for 32B TXIDs const txid32bCache = new Map(); async function lookupTxid32b(txid4b, rowNum) { if (!client) return; const resultDiv = document.getElementById(`txid32b-${rowNum}`); const btn = document.getElementById(`lookup-btn-${rowNum}`); // Check cache first if (txid32bCache.has(txid4b)) { const cached = txid32bCache.get(txid4b); if (cached) { resultDiv.innerHTML = `${cached}`; } else { resultDiv.innerHTML = `
Not found
`; } btn.disabled = true; return; } // Show loading resultDiv.innerHTML = `
Looking up...
`; btn.disabled = true; try { log(`Looking up 32B TXID for 4B: ${txid4b}`, 'info'); const txid32b = await client.queryTxidMapping(txid4b); if (txid32b) { // Reverse bytes for display (Bitcoin TXIDs are displayed in reverse byte order) const reversedTxid = Array.from(txid32b).reverse(); const hex = reversedTxid.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join(''); // Make it a clickable link to mempool.space resultDiv.innerHTML = `${hex}`; txid32bCache.set(txid4b, hex); log(`Found 32B TXID: ${hex}`, 'success'); } else { resultDiv.innerHTML = `
Not found in mapping
`; txid32bCache.set(txid4b, null); log(`32B TXID not found for 4B: ${txid4b}`, 'error'); } } catch (error) { resultDiv.innerHTML = `
Error: ${error.message}
`; log(`Error looking up TXID: ${error.message}`, 'error'); btn.disabled = false; // Re-enable on error } } function updatePaginationControls() { if (!paginationState) return; const totalPages = Math.ceil(Number(paginationState.totalEntries) / PAGE_SIZE); document.getElementById('pageInfo').textContent = `Page ${currentPage + 1} of ${totalPages}`; document.getElementById('utxoCountInfo').textContent = `${paginationState.totalEntries} total UTXOs | ${paginationState.entries.length} cached`; document.getElementById('prevPageBtn').disabled = currentPage === 0; document.getElementById('nextPageBtn').disabled = currentPage >= totalPages - 1; } async function loadPage(page) { if (!paginationState || !client) return; const loadingDiv = document.getElementById('utxoLoading'); loadingDiv.classList.remove('hidden'); try { const entries = await client.getUtxoPage(paginationState, page, PAGE_SIZE); const startIndex = page * PAGE_SIZE; updateUtxoTable(entries, startIndex); currentPage = page; updatePaginationControls(); } catch (error) { log(`Error loading page: ${error.message}`, 'error'); } finally { loadingDiv.classList.add('hidden'); } } async function connect() { const server1Url = document.getElementById('server1Url').value.trim(); const server2Url = document.getElementById('server2Url').value.trim(); if (!server1Url || !server2Url) { log('Please enter both server URLs', 'error'); return; } try { log(`Connecting to servers...`); log(` Server 1: ${server1Url}`); log(` Server 2: ${server2Url}`); client = createPirClient(server1Url, server2Url); await client.connect(); lastConnectedUrls = { server1: server1Url, server2: server2Url }; log('Successfully connected to both servers!', 'success'); setStatus(`Connected to ${server1Url} & ${server2Url}`, true); setButtons(true); } catch (error) { log(`Connection failed: ${error.message}`, 'error'); setStatus('Connection Failed', false); client = null; } } function disconnect() { if (client) { client.disconnect(); client = null; log('Disconnected from servers', 'info'); setStatus('Disconnected', false); setButtons(false); } // Reset pagination state paginationState = null; currentPage = 0; document.getElementById('utxoSection').classList.add('hidden'); } async function queryUtxos() { // Auto-connect if not connected if (!client || !client.isConnected()) { log('Not connected. Connecting first...', 'info'); await connect(); if (!client) return; // Connection failed } const scriptPubkeyHex = document.getElementById('scriptPubkey').value.trim(); if (!scriptPubkeyHex) { log('Please enter a script pubkey', 'error'); return; } // Reset pagination state and cache paginationState = null; currentPage = 0; txid32bCache.clear(); document.getElementById('utxoSection').classList.add('hidden'); try { // Convert script pubkey hex to bytes const scriptPubkey = hexToBytes(scriptPubkeyHex); log(`Script Pubkey: ${scriptPubkeyHex}`, 'info'); log(`Script Pubkey length: ${scriptPubkey.length} bytes`, 'info'); // Compute RIPEMD160 hash of the script pubkey const scriptHashBytes = await scriptHash(scriptPubkey); const scriptHashHex = bytesToHex(scriptHashBytes); log(`Computed RIPEMD160 hash: ${scriptHashHex}`, 'info'); // Initialize pagination state log('Starting PIR query...', 'info'); paginationState = await client.initUtxoPagination(scriptHashBytes); if (!paginationState) { log(`Script hash not found in database`, 'error'); setResult( `Script Pubkey: ${scriptPubkeyHex}\n\n` + `RIPEMD160 Hash: ${scriptHashHex}\n\n` + `Result: Script hash NOT FOUND\n\n` + `This address has no UTXOs in the database.` ); return; } const totalEntries = paginationState.totalEntries; const offset = paginationState.startOffset; const chunkIndex = Math.floor(offset / 32768); const localOffset = offset % 32768; log(`Found offset ${offset}`, 'info'); log(`Total UTXO count = ${totalEntries}`, 'success'); setResult( `Script Pubkey: ${scriptPubkeyHex}\n\n` + `RIPEMD160 Hash: ${scriptHashHex}\n\n` + `----------------------------------------\n` + `PIR QUERY RESULTS\n` + `----------------------------------------\n` + ` Chunk offset: ${offset}\n` + ` Chunk index: ${chunkIndex}\n` + ` Local offset: ${localOffset}\n\n` + `Number of UTXOs: ${totalEntries}\n\n` + `Scroll down to view UTXO entries with pagination.` ); // Show UTXO section if there are entries if (totalEntries > 0n) { document.getElementById('utxoSection').classList.remove('hidden'); log('Loading first page of UTXO entries...', 'info'); await loadPage(0); } log('Query completed', 'success'); } catch (error) { log(`Query failed: ${error.message}`, 'error'); setResult(`Error: ${error.message}`); } } // Add event listeners document.getElementById('connectBtn').addEventListener('click', connect); document.getElementById('reconnectBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => { disconnect(); await connect(); }); document.getElementById('disconnectBtn').addEventListener('click', disconnect); document.getElementById('queryCuckooBtn').addEventListener('click', queryUtxos); document.getElementById('prevPageBtn').addEventListener('click', () => loadPage(currentPage - 1)); document.getElementById('nextPageBtn').addEventListener('click', () => loadPage(currentPage + 1)); // Show reconnect button when URLs change document.getElementById('server1Url').addEventListener('input', updateReconnectButton); document.getElementById('server2Url').addEventListener('input', updateReconnectButton); // Initialize with default button states setButtons(false);
